# Data.Maybe

<!-- Generated by `prism docs` from `lib/std/Data/Maybe.pr`. Do not edit by hand. -->

Operations over `Option`.

The type is wired in; the prelude opens this module, so these are in unqualified scope everywhere.

## Functions and Values

### `is_some`

```prism,sig,h-d9b3544c6dda23ceba286dd4144437a454aa0c6682c721584446b9bb9f9a38ca
is_some : forall a. (Option(a)) -> Bool
```

True when the option holds a value.

### `is_none`

```prism,sig,h-4a7f178e7204e16b7459463e422537c354c1dbff8116e9ecb5483e21e97028e1
is_none : forall a. (Option(a)) -> Bool
```

True when the option is empty.

### `unwrap_or`

```prism,sig,h-e9c0f920bc532c587faa040b072d1ffc9e821780230dbdf1969fab5b67075e3c
unwrap_or : forall a. (a, Option(a)) -> a
```

The contained value, or the default `d` when the option is empty.

```prism
unwrap_or(0, Some(5))
```

### `map_option`

```prism,sig,h-80a8b5c529470754b84ccb99ae67d90bf88e21f1365a15e2465007bd48377259
map_option : forall a b e0. ((b) -> a ! {e0}, Option(b)) -> Option(a) ! {e0}
```

Apply `f` to the contained value, leaving `None` untouched.

The default `d` here is not an option, so this example is rejected:

```prism,compile_fail
unwrap_or(0, 5)
```

### `and_then`

```prism,sig,h-9ec19b8e578cff898cca70ecf817048bfa89aad683b64c9e9c764b203764a5e1
and_then : forall a b e0. ((a) -> Option(b) ! {e0}, Option(a)) -> Option(b) ! {e0}
```

Chain an option-returning function, short-circuiting on `None` (monadic bind for `Option`).

### `map_or`

```prism,sig,h-9da5aa368507d0ceb57c73d699cda147beaf98ceeb6bcc6109b0300f6d2739b5
map_or : forall a b e0. (a, (b) -> a ! {e0}, Option(b)) -> a ! {e0}
```

### `option_or`

```prism,sig,h-656f5c0d7eba0e3b92868015fa5462d28fd45ac00bc0e6c9eac96bc7d5031b47
option_or : forall a. (Option(a), Option(a)) -> Option(a)
```

### `option_to_list`

```prism,sig,h-e1cd1076a3483475deb12027de9c1c7d846d824a87fdca0f97b8e4bfd0c6e09c
option_to_list : forall a. (Option(a)) -> List(a)
```

### `both`

```prism,sig,h-be4380a99d301b60bf430a9cffea6e091ddeab474ed60fc71fab83c5738ff8e5
both : forall a b. (Option(a), Option(b)) -> Option((a, b))
```

### `option_fold_r`

```prism,sig,h-b528b675c57236dec66947700c358f96d41b0c4a84e23f8bf26d712bd3af0f33
option_fold_r : forall a b e0. ((a, b) -> b ! {e0}, b, Option(a)) -> b ! {e0}
```

### `option_bind`

```prism,sig,h-8ec73c673dff2d97d483f933ba2d4c264b69d83b1c4cf2531647431c9c8c9b5b
option_bind : forall a b e0. (Option(a), (a) -> Option(b) ! {e0}) -> Option(b) ! {e0}
```

### `option_ap`

```prism,sig,h-4645b90903e9dcc8806aeaac4500364f13209cd7573887549fa9a36548428131
option_ap : forall a b e0. (Option((b) -> a ! {e0}), Option(b)) -> Option(a) ! {e0}
```
